script.narration: You started strong with a clean opening, getting John engaged right away.
You then dove into discovery and asked about ticket volume, which helped tease out some relevant issues.
But when the Tableau integration concern came up, your confidence dipped, and it showed.
Instead of pursuing that high-value customization path, you went with the roadmap, which dropped the EV significantly.
In the end, he checked out, saying just send the deck, and that was it — deal lost.
